title: Selection-Robust Targeting of Post-Clearance Undervaluation Audits: reproducibility package
description: Code that reproduces every figure, table, and proposition check in the paper 'Selection-Robust Targeting of Post-Clearance Undervaluation Audits: Correcting for Inspection-Induced Label Bias'. Three self-contained scripts (numpy and scikit-learn, CPU only): (1) paper1_backbone.py reproduces the operating points, the identification ladder, the held-out policy uplift, and the inspected-only evaluation bias; (2) paper1_prop6_verify.py numerically confirms the minimum-audit-allocation rule (Proposition 6); (3) paper1_adverse_grid.py reproduces the adverse-DGP band-intensity sweep showing the policy uplift is a monotone function of the duty mass hidden in the structural blind band. Library versions are pinned for exact reproducibility. A fourth script, paper1_consistency.py, confirms the finite-sample consistency and interval coverage of the design estimator across sample sizes (root-n rate). A fifth script, paper1_bandsize.py, sweeps the blind band's size to show the policy gain is robust across band extents.
